2603.23047.title: Parametric Knowledge and Retrieval Behavior in RAG Fine-Tuning for Electronic Design Automation
2603.23047.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) fine-tuning has shown substantial improvements over vanilla RAG, yet most studies target document question answering and often rely on standard NLP metrics that can obscure factual differences. We evaluate RAG fine-tuning for long-form text generation in electronic design automation, adapting a 7B model under five context augmentation strategies with varying retrieval conditions. We introduce TriFEX, a human-validated, triple-based evaluation pipeline that attributes generated claims to their origin-user query, context and reference-and propose Parametric Knowledge Precision (PKP), which isolates internalized knowledge by filtering out claims leaked in the prompt. We show that ROUGE and BERTScore fail to detect factual differences that our triple-based evaluation reveals. Additionally, we demonstrate that an existing metric for knowledge internalization is retrieva-sensitive, with about 75% of its cross-condition variance driven by changes in the rate at which internal knowledge is expressed (PR), rather than by changes in its actual correctness (PKP). The fine-tuned 7B variants outperform a 72B baseline on most metrics, further showing generalization across conditions and on a related benchmark. These results underscore the limitations of available metrics in RAG evaluation and show that smaller models could be reasonably well adapted to specialized tasks for cost-efficient, on-premises deployment.
2603.23047.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）微調在性能上顯著優於原始的 RAG，但大多數研究針對文檔問答，並且通常依賴於標準的自然語言處理指標，這可能會掩蓋事實上的差異。<lb/>我們評估了 RAG 微調在電子設計自動化中的長文本生成，並在五種不同的檢索條件下調整了一個 7B 模型。<lb/>我們引入了 TriFEX，一個經過人類驗證的基於三元組的評估管道，將生成的聲明歸因於其來源用戶查詢、上下文和參考——並提出了參數化知識精確度（PKP），通過過濾掉在提示中洩漏的聲明來隔離內化知識。<lb/>我們顯示 ROUGE 和 BERTScore 無法檢測到我們的基於三元組的評估所揭示的事實差異。<lb/>此外，我們展示了一個現有的知識內化指標對檢索敏感，約 75% 的跨條件變異是由內部知識表達的速率變化（PR）驅動，而不是由其實際正確性變化（PKP）驅動。<lb/>微調後的 7B 變體在大多數指標上超越了 72B 基準，進一步顯示了在不同條件下的泛化能力以及在相關基準上的表現。<lb/>這些結果強調了現有指標在 RAG 評估中的局限性，並顯示較小的模型可以合理地適應專門任務，以實現成本效益高的本地部署。
2603.23047.author: Julian Oestreich et.al.
2603.23047.authors: Julian Oestreich, Maximilian Bley, Frank Binder, Lydia Müller, Maksym Sydorenko, André Alcalde
